changelog: New! Mod Store launched—open plugin system for GPIO, LED, GPS, flashlight, custom HA sensors without bloating main app. Submit or install mods on-demand. Path: Settings → Advanced → Mod Store. Thanks @slovebj for YX LED controller PR. SendSpin optimized: ms latency tuning, low-end playback mode, optional fullscreen popup disabled, clock sync fixed, UI adapted. Fixed: SP popup disable (#42), MA video-no-audio (#44), SP volume sync (#43), BT proxy control (#36). Thanks @danwig, @Coolguy1211, @bambam247.
